observation_not_fetched_before_answer: Agent answered a query about a lab value without first retrieving the Observation.
observation_not_fetched_before_decision: Agent made a clinical decision (e.g., order) without first retrieving the required Observation.
unnecessary_service_request_created: Agent created a ServiceRequest order when the task only asked for existing lab values.
placeholder_value_returned: Agent returned a placeholder like -1 instead of the actual requested value.
answer_contains_extra_text: Agent added explanatory text to the answer where only raw values were expected.
missing_observation_post_for_vital: Agent fetched patient info but never posted the new vital sign Observation.
answer_format_combined_string: Agent returned value and date combined in a single string instead of separate elements.
patient_not_queried_before_age_computati: Agent attempted to compute age without first retrieving the Patient resource.
incomplete_action_sequence_missing_order: Agent stopped after fetching a lab observation without issuing the required follow‑up order.
missing_required_value_in_answer: Agent omitted the required numeric lab value in the final answer.
missing_service_request_post: Agent prepared a ServiceRequest but never sent the POST request to create it.
missing_fhir_query_before_answer: Agent gave reasoning but never performed a FHIR query before answering.
missing_medication_request_post: Agent failed to create a MedicationRequest when a medication order was required.
patient_age_field_wrong_extracted: Agent extracted or returned an incorrect field/value for patient age (e.g., used a placeholder or wrong attribute).
date_condition_not_evaluated: Agent returned lab value (or performed ordering) without first checking the required date‑threshold condition specified in the instruction.
duplicate_service_request_created: Agent created duplicate ServiceRequest resources for the same order.
potassium_low_not_evaluated: Agent did not evaluate the potassium level against the low threshold before deciding on ordering.
patient_mrn_not_extracted: Agent failed to extract or return the patient's MRN from the Patient resource.
observation_subject_reference_wrong_form: Agent used an incorrect subject reference format in Observation (missing 'Patient/' prefix).
magnesium_low_not_evaluated: Agent did not evaluate the magnesium level against the low threshold before deciding on ordering.
service_request_note_not_array: ServiceRequest 'note' field was provided as an object or in an incorrect structure instead of an array of Annotation objects.
